name: ここにタイトルを入力
original_name: ここにタイトルを入力
overview:
Featuring ‘pre-recorded panel discussions and live banter between the presenters’ and ‘incorporating viewers’ opinions during the broadcast’, the show’s utterly chaotic content sparked a flurry of comments on social media after each episode, with viewers describing it as ‘completely baffling’, ‘surreal’ and ‘madness’. Now, ‘Enter Title Here’ is making a comeback as a regular series!

A succession of innovative segments will be aired—ones you simply won’t be able to resist telling someone about once you’ve seen them!
